title: turanga bonnetiana
intro: Turanga bonnetiana, commonly known as Turanga, is a flowering plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its therapeutic actions such as wound healing and pain relief. The bioactive constituents of Turanga include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
